zh.Ormesby, North Yorkshire, England, Unite: 英國英格蘭諾斯 越可爾奧斯比
zh.lifeSummary: Anne Meeres於大約1240年出生在英國英格蘭諾斯 越可爾奧斯比。她於大約1266年與William De Ormesby在英國英格蘭諾斯 越可爾奧斯比結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。

nameMeanings.name: Meeres
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Asturian-Leonese and Catalan: habitational name from any of the places so named in Asturias and Catalonia.

variants.name: Mieras
meanings: Spanish: Castilianized form of Asturian-Leonese and Catalan   Mieres  .

nameMeanings.name: Anne
meanings: A name corrpted from Hannah, q.v. It is also found several times in a male name. From Ann, Anne, we have as nicknames Nan and Nancy

variants.name: Nancy
meanings: Of uncertain origin. From the 18th century it is clearly used as a pet form of   Ann   (  see  Nan  ), but it may originally have been a similar formation deriving from the common medieval given name   Annis  , a vernacular form of   Agnes .  Nowadays it is an independent name, and was especially popular in America in the 1930s, 40s, and 50s.

variants.name: Nan
meanings: Originally a pet form of Ann (for the initial N-, compare Ned ). It is now also widely used as a short form of Nancy .

en.lifeSummary: Anne Meeres was born about 1240, in Ormesby, North Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom. She married William De Ormesby about 1266, in Ormesby, North Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son.

ja.lifeSummary: Anne Meeresは約1240年にイギリスイギリスノース ヨークシュアイアオルメスビーで生まれた。約1266年にイギリスイギリスノース ヨークシュアイアオルメスビーでWilliam De Ormesbyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。

ko.lifeSummary: Anne Meeres(은)는 대략 1240년 영국 잉글랜드 노르스 요르크실르 오메스비에서 태어났다. 그녀는 대략 1266년 영국 잉글랜드 노르스 요르크실르 오메스비에서 William De Ormesby(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다.
